title: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) Exceeds Q3 2026 Expectations with Strong Revenue Growth
text: Elastic N.V. (ESTC) delivered strong financial results in Q3 FY2026, with revenue of $450 million, exceeding analyst expectations. The company demonstrated consistent execution and momentum across key business metrics. Revenue Performance: Total revenue of $450 million represented 18% year-over-year growth. Sales-led subscription revenue reached $376 million, up 21% year-over-year. Operating Margins: Non-GAAP operating margin reached 18.6%, reflecting strong operating leverage. Subscription gross margin of 82% demonstrates pricing power and customer value. Customer Metrics: Current remaining performance obligations (CRPO) surpassed $1 billion, providing heightened forward revenue visibility. Customers with $100k+ ACV exceeded 1,660, growing 14% year-over-year. Large deal commitments ($1M+ annual value) grew more than 30% year-over-year. AI Adoption: Over 3,000 customers using Elastic for AI use cases. 2,700+ customers on Elastic Cloud for vector database workloads. 28% AI penetration within the $100,000+ ACV customer cohort. Management Commentary: CEO Ashutosh Kulkarni highlighted the ability to bridge enterprise data to the LLM, which is translating into expanded AI adoption and customer expansion.
